name: seet
description: SIP End to end Testing Suite

scripts.start:
export NODE_NO_WARNINGS=1 && echo '
 SIPConnect v1.1 - Interop Test Plan' && mocha -r ts-node -s 460000 -t 360000  dist/sc/sip_pbx/registration_mode/tg.js dist/sc/sip_pbx/static_mode/tg.js dist/sc/sip_pbx/basic_calling/tg.js dist/sc/sip_pbx/basic_features/tg.js dist/load_tests

author: Pedro Sanders <sanderspedro@gmail.com>
